历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including old Gaokao Science) was approximately 11814 → 6670 → 4196 → 284 → 303. In 2024, after Jiangxi implemented the new Gaokao, Shanghai Jiao Tong University no longer set up a low-score batch for the Agricultural College in Jiangxi; all majors were unified under the Physics Category (Group 502), and the minimum ranking jumped from about 4196 in the old Gaokao to about 284, with a baseline of about 303 in 2025, remaining stable around 300 in recent two years. The enrollment plan for Physics Category (including old Gaokao Science) in Jiangxi: 35 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 89 in 2023, 18 in 2024, 19 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 20, a slight expansion of about 5.3% compared to 2025, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 4th consecutively in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top tier of national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In the 2026 Gaokao cycle, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (high number of retractions, students embezzling bonuses, etc.), which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with moderate overall exposure. In 2021, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (Henan Science ranked last among the five prestigious universities in East China), but no obvious gaps have been recorded in recent years. It has A+ disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Biology, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, etc.) and a total of 28 A/A- disciplines, highly matching its enrollment majors (Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, Science Experimental Class, etc.), with strong disciplinary strength attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information/Communication and other top majors at SJTU have been highly recommended in 2024–2026, with Electrical Engineering and Automation gaining heat, leading to fierce competition in related majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Gaokao is about 474,900, roughly flat compared to 2025 (Physics Category 266,425 + History Category 206,055 = 472,480). Estimated by historical proportion, the 2026 Physics Category candidates are about 267,800, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 2025's 266,425, intensifying competition slightly. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong geographical appeal to Jiangxi candidates. The university enrolls a small number of students in Jiangxi (about 20), making it cross-provincial enrollment without local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of stable rankings around 300 in the new Gaokao from 2024 to 2025, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (19→20) easing competition, the mildly negative reputation slightly suppressing enthusiasm, and the slight increase in total Physics Category candidates, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 303. The predicted minimum ranking is about 323, with a range of 286–360.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 286–360, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 286), prioritize Tier 1 top majors (IEEE Pilot Class, Artificial Intelligence Top Talent Class, etc.); if the ranking is near the upper bound (around 360), mainly choose Tier 2 majors, with Tier 3 majors as a safe option. All majors enrolled by SJTU in Jiangxi Physics Category are top engineering/science directions, with discipline evaluation grades generally A/A+, making the overall application value extremely high.
